verse_text: Incline not my heart to evil words, To make excuses in sins With men who work lawlessness; And I will not join with their choice ones.

links.context: Christians extend hospitality, but not indiscriminately (see [[PSA.140:4]], [[PSA.140:5]]; [[2TI.3:6]]). Almsgiving--giving to the needy--has always been a godly virtue. The Wisdom of Sirach teaches when one practices this virtue to wisely choose a godly recipient. The man who does not give alms is classed with those who persist in evil (v. 3).
